entries.title: Yupp shuts down after raising $33M from a16z crypto’s Chris Dixon
entries.description: Less than a year after launching, with checks from some of the biggest names in Silicon Valley, crowdsourced AI model feedback startup Yupp is closing its business, the company said Tuesday.

entries.title: Alexa+ gets new food ordering experiences with Uber Eats and Grubhub
entries.description: You can now order from Uber Eats and Grubhub using Alexa+, an experience Amazon says will be similar to chatting with a waiter at a restaurant or placing an order at a drive-thru.

entries.title: Nomadic raises $8.4 million to wrangle the data pouring off autonomous vehicles
entries.description: The company turns footage from robots into structured, searchable datasets with a deep learning model.

entries.title: Exclusive: Runway launches $10M fund, Builders program to support early-stage AI startups
entries.description: Runway is launching a $10 million fund and startup program to back companies building with its AI video models, as it pushes toward interactive, real-time “video intelligence” applications.

entries.title: With its new app store, Ring bets on AI to go beyond home security
entries.description: Ring's app store will allow the company to target broader use cases beyond security, like elder care or business needs.

entries.description: Is this just normal corporate strategy, or are we about to see a broader pullback on AI-generated video?

entries.title: Bluesky leans into AI with Attie, an app for building custom feeds
entries.description: Bluesky’s new app Attie uses AI to help people build custom feeds the open social networking protocol atproto.

entries.title: Stanford study outlines dangers of asking AI chatbots for personal advice
entries.description: While there’s been plenty of debate about AI sycophancy, a new study by Stanford computer scientists attempts to measure how harmful that tendency might be.

entries.title: Elon Musk’s last co-founder reportedly leaves xAI
entries.description: All but two of Musk's 11 xAI co-founders departed before this week.

entries.title: 15% of Americans say they’d be willing to work for an AI boss, according to new poll
entries.description: According to a Quinnipiac University poll, 15% of Americans say they'd be willing to have a job where their direct supervisor was an AI program that assigned tasks and set schedules.

entries.title: Popular AI gateway startup LiteLLM ditches controversial startup Delve
entries.description: LiteLLM had obtained two security compliance certifications via Delve and fell victim to some horrific credential-stealing malware last week.

entries.title: As more Americans adopt AI tools, fewer say they can trust the results
entries.description: AI adoption is rising in the U.S., but trust remains low, with most Americans concerned about transparency, regulation, and the technology’s broader societal impact, according to a new Quinnipiac poll

entries.title: Mantis Biotech is making ‘digital twins’ of humans to help solve medicine’s data availability problem
entries.description: Mantis takes disparate sources of data to make synthetic datasets that can be used to build so-called "digital twins" of the human body, representing anatomy, physiology and behavior.

entries.title: ScaleOps raises $130M to improve computing efficiency amid AI demand
entries.description: ScaleOps just raised $130M to tackle GPU shortages and soaring AI cloud costs by automating infrastructure in real time.

entries.title: AI chip startup Rebellions raises $400 million at $2.3B valuation in pre-IPO round
entries.description: The startup, which is planning to go public later this year, designs chips specifically for AI inference, another challenger to Nvidia's dominance.

entries.title: Mistral AI raises $830M in debt to set up a data center near Paris
entries.description: Mistral aims to start operating the data center by the second quarter of 2026.

entries.title: Qodo raises $70M for code verification as AI coding scales
entries.description: As AI floods software development with code, Qodo is betting the real challenge is making sure it actually works.

entries.title: Starcloud raises $170 million Series A to build data centers in space
entries.description: Starcloud becomes the fastest Y Combinator startup to reach unicorn status, just 17 months after demo day.
